case_title: LUCKY, MARK BURDON VS CANEVARO, LADONA R. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT SENT TO LADONA CANEVARO (HOTEL GRIFFON) RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCKY, MARK BURDON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CANEVARO, LADONA R. HOTEL GRIFFON DEFENDANT HOTEL GRIFFON IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LUCKY, MARK BURDON AS TO DEFENDANT CANEVARO, LADONA R. HOTEL GRIFFON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
